questions.question: Explain Singly Linked List C and its primary use case in C Programming.
questions.answer: Singly Linked List C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with Singly Linked List C?

questions.question: How does the C Programming runtime optimize Singly Linked List C under the hood?
